strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise across multiple production roles (Optilyz, RIDE Capital, re:cinq) covering both backend and frontend layers
LLM and AI-agent infrastructure experience at re:cinq, including MCP tooling — directly matches the nice-to-have criteria
Demonstrated software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and Kubernetes/AWS hands-on experience spanning real production systems
concerns: Substantial seniority overshoot — Staff/Senior-level trajectory with 15+ years of experience is a poor fit for a Junior/Mid role, creating likely misalignment on compensation, scope, and career expectations
PostgreSQL is not mentioned; database experience skews toward MongoDB and unspecified SQL, leaving the primary required DB preference unverified
React is listed only in the skills summary without a dedicated role or project; frontend exposure is predominantly Ember.js, making React depth difficult to assess
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has the technical foundation to perform the role's duties — TypeScript, REST APIs, full-stack architecture, and AI tooling are all present — but the candidate is operating at a Staff/Senior level and the position is scoped for entry-to-mid contributors; this gap is likely to produce friction around compensation, autonomy expectations, and long-term retention regardless of technical fit.
